# services.iperf3

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.iperf3`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.iperf3.affinity` | `null or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0)` | CPU affinity for the process. |
| `services.iperf3.authorizedUsersFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the configuration file containing authorized users credentials to run iperf tests. |
| `services.iperf3.bind` | `null or string` | Bind to the specific interface associated with the given address. |
| `services.iperf3.debug` | `boolean` | Emit debugging output. |
| `services.iperf3.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable iperf3 network throughput testing server. |
| `services.iperf3.extraFlags` | `list of string` | Extra flags to pass to iperf3(1). |
| `services.iperf3.forceFlush` | `boolean` | Force flushing output at every interval. |
| `services.iperf3.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open ports in the firewall for iperf3. |
| `services.iperf3.package` | `package` | The iperf3 package to use. |
| `services.iperf3.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Server port to listen on for iperf3 client requests. |
| `services.iperf3.rsaPrivateKey` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the RSA private key (not password-protected) used to decrypt authentication credentials from the client. |
| `services.iperf3.verbose` | `boolean` | Give more detailed output. |
